findings.summary: OLIMEX ESP32-SBC-FabGL (118 components). Correct: 118 components, CH340X USB-UART, transistors, fiducials, RC/LC filters, ESD protection, USB pair. Incorrect: VGA1 DB-15 connector as varistor, AUDIO1 audio jack as IC, U5 SY8089 input_rail=GND, U7 MT3608 fb_net=GND. Missed: battery sensing voltage divider R17/R18, R-2R VGA DAC, PS/2 interfaces, SPI bus.

missed.description: Voltage divider R17(470k)/R18(150k) for battery sensing not detected

suggestions: Recognize VGA/audio connectors by footprint library
